rules.rule_text:
rule MintsLoader
{
	meta:
		author = "RussianPanda"
		description = "Detects MintsLoader scripts"
		date = "01/16/2026"

	strings:
		$s1 = "Get-Date).DayOfYear" ascii wide nocase
		$s2 = ".php?id=$" ascii wide nocase
		$s3 = ".top" ascii wide
		$s4 = "$global" ascii wide

	condition:
		3 of them
}
